To whom it may concern,

Thank you for your warm reminder.

For your info, the strike is protected by the Basic Law of HKSAR as below:-

Article 27
Hong Kong residents shall have freedom of speech, of the press and of publication; freedom of association, of assembly, of procession and of demonstration; and the right and freedom to form and join trade unions, and to strike.

I will remind other strikers to fully compile with the Basic Law, and please remind the HA top management to fully compile with the Basic Law, too.

Thank you.
